title: Sky's 2e Tweaks
description: A collection of small QoL tweaks and fixes for Pathfinder 2e, including Magic+ Essence Casting automation fixes.

requires.reason: Wraps actor.updateResource for the combat-only Essence Pool and Second Draw leak correction. Without it those tweaks silently no-op.

recommends.reason: The Essence Casting tweaks fix automation gaps in Magic+.
